clause: Vendor shall be liable for any and all damages.
recommendation: Add a reasonable cap on liability.

clause: Supplier assumes responsibility for all losses arising from this agreement.
recommendation: Limit liability to direct damages only.

clause: Liability under this agreement shall be unlimited.
Contractor shall bear all financial losses regardless of cause.
Party agrees to compensate all damages without limitation.
Company may terminate this agreement immediately without notice.
recommendation: Require notice and cure periods before termination.

clause: Employer may end employment at any time without prior notice.
Agreement may be terminated at the sole discretion of the company.
recommendation: Allow termination rights for both parties.

clause: Service provider reserves the right to terminate services at any time.
Company may cancel this agreement without cause.
This agreement shall automatically renew for successive one year terms.
Contract automatically renews unless cancelled in writing.
Subscription shall renew annually by default.
recommendation: Require explicit customer approval before renewal.

clause: Agreement renews automatically upon expiration.
Term shall automatically extend for an additional period.
Employee shall not engage in competing business for five years.
Employee may not work for a competitor after termination.
recommendation: Limit restrictions to legitimate business interests.

clause: Contractor agrees not to provide services to competitors.
recommendation: Narrow the restriction to specific competing activities.

clause: Employee is restricted from similar businesses within the region.
Employee shall refrain from competitive activities for three years.
Vendor shall indemnify and hold harmless the company from all claims.
recommendation: Limit indemnity to vendor negligence or misconduct.

clause: Supplier assumes all legal liabilities arising from performance.
Contractor agrees to defend against all third party claims.
recommendation: Limit indemnity obligations to specific claim types.

clause: Party shall be responsible for all losses and liabilities.
Vendor shall cover all costs resulting from legal actions.
Recipient shall maintain confidentiality indefinitely.
recommendation: Limit confidentiality obligations to a defined period.

clause: Confidentiality obligations survive forever.
recommendation: Set a reasonable confidentiality survival period.

clause: Information disclosed shall remain confidential permanently.
Recipient agrees to perpetual confidentiality obligations.
recommendation: Replace perpetual obligations with fixed-term obligations.

clause: Confidential information shall never be disclosed at any time.
recommendation: Allow confidentiality obligations to expire after a reasonable period.

clause: Company may collect personal data without consent.
recommendation: Require explicit user consent before data collection.

clause: User information may be shared with third parties without notice.
recommendation: Require transparency and consent for sharing.

clause: Personal data may be retained indefinitely.
recommendation: Define a lawful data retention period.

clause: Data processing may occur without user approval.
recommendation: Require documented lawful basis for processing.

clause: User data may be transferred internationally without safeguards.
